## Summary

- What changed and why

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e:smoke` (if backend/data flow affected)

## Screenshots (UI changes)

Add before/after screenshots if relevant.

## Database/Migrations

- [ ] No migration
- [ ] Migration added under `supabase/migrations/`

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
